features.label: Modular Directory Structure
features.desc: URL Encoder split into tools/url-encoder/ with 6 files: utils.js, encode.js, parser.js, builder.js, tools.js, index.js.

features.label: Auto-detect
features.desc: Paste anything → auto-detects plain text, encoded string, URL, or query string.

features.label: Parse & Edit + URL Diff
features.desc: Parse any URL into all components. Edit query params inline. Diff two URLs side-by-side.

features.label: Query String Builder
features.desc: Visually add/remove/toggle key-value pairs. URL builds live. Import params from any URL.

features.label: Batch Encode/Decode/Canonicalize
features.desc: Process multiple URLs at once — one per line.

features.label: URL Validator
features.desc: Validates protocol, hostname, TLD, path encoding.

features.label: URL Canonicalize
features.desc: Normalizes URL: lowercase hostname, remove default ports, sort query params, remove trailing slash.

features.label: URL to Code
features.desc: Generate ready-to-use code in 8 formats: JS fetch, JS axios, Python, curl, wget, PHP, Go.

features.label: QR Code Generator
features.desc: Generate a visual QR-style pattern from any URL. Download as PNG.

features.label: URL History
features.desc: Last 15 processed URLs saved per session.
